architecture.summary: BlockID.au — AI-powered startup valuation SaaS for AU founders (pre-seed → Series A). Next.js 16 standalone + Supabase + zero-downtime port-swap deploys. Multi-model AI engine (Claude Sonnet 4.6, Groq, Cerebras, SambaNova, OpenRouter fallback). C-Level AI agents (cto/cfo/cpo/cmo/cro/clo/chro/ciso/cdo/coo/rnd) self-research and self-upgrade domain modules under src/lib/agents/. CEO implementing-plan loop + daily cron pipeline (34+ jobs) ship continuous improvements off-peak (AEST 22:00-06:00). SCN model (Validation→Position→Value→Direction→Capital) drives the full product flow.
notes: v0.2.0 — CEO implementing-plan loop (research → CEO plan → code → version/milestone/architecture), off-peak deploy gating.
v0.3.0 — CFO VC-grade valuation engine (src/lib/agents/cfo-valuation.ts): market sizing (TAM/SAM/SOM), 4 valuation methods, projections, unit economics, break-even, payback, financial injection.

v0.4.0 — VC Valuation Dashboard (/dashboard/valuation, 6 tabs) + /api/valuation/vc endpoint + /benchmarks page (AU startup data by stage, FAQ JSON-LD). Cross-linked from navbar, footer, sitemap, 4 tool pages.

v0.5.0 — Feedback widget FAB (T0004, all workspace pages → /api/feedback, credits-on-submit) + CSV export on VC dashboard (T0007, full 36-month model) + SCN context detection verified live (src/lib/scn-detect.ts + /api/scn/detect, integrated in main dashboard).

v2.0.0 — T0086–T0090 Feature Batch 8: Financial Projection Norms calculator, Term Sheet AI v2 persistence + Lawyer Questions, Fundraising Readiness Report v2 (checklist + AU comparable raises), Google Analytics OAuth evidence connector, SVI Cohort Benchmark page.

v2.1.0 — T0094–T0101: ESOP Manager (pool + grants UI + API), 36-month financial model, data room 13-section structure, BlockID SVI 68/100 self-analysis, C-Level knowledge base (4 modules), valuation A$440K pre-money.

v2.2.0 — Batch 9 (T0102-T0110): ESOP governance scoring engine (cfo-esop-scoring.ts), knowledge base API, /api/esop/score, SVI upgrade roadmap widget, ESOP legal checklist tool, data room readiness API.

tasks.title: Mandatory daily C-Level reporting template + EOD enforcement
tasks.rationale: Standardise every C-Level status update. KPI: 100% of C-Level agents report each cycle.

tasks.title: Off-peak daily auto-upgrade CI/CD pipeline (first deploy < 48h)
tasks.rationale: agent-deploy (tsc→lint→build→smoke→deploy-live) + orchestrator CEO loop scheduled 12/14/16/18 UTC off-peak.

tasks.title: Pilot a new valuation-model feature (allocate ≥10% AI budget)
tasks.rationale: Prototype an improved valuation model in src/lib/agents/cfo-valuation.ts: add comparable company multiples from AU market data (src/lib/benchmarks.ts) and a Berkus method for pre-revenue startups. KPI: +5% SVI correlation with valuation mid, no accuracy regression on vitest suite. AU-stage discount factors (AVCAL 2025) added to comparablesMethod; AU comparable companies cited by sector. 7/7 tests pass.

tasks.title: Daily QA health-check — automated test suite in the QA dashboard
tasks.rationale: vitest suite wired into agent-healthcheck. KPI: 100% test pass on daily QA dashboard.

tasks.title: Power-user feedback widget (floating FAB on all workspace pages)
tasks.rationale: FeedbackWidget FAB added to WorkspaceLayout — category selector, textarea, AI-scored credits-on-submit, connects to /api/feedback. All logged-in pages now have a persistent feedback entry point.

tasks.title: Valuation dashboard UI (/dashboard/valuation, 6 tabs)
tasks.rationale: Live at /dashboard/valuation with 6 tabs: Summary, Market, Methods, Projections, Unit Economics, Raise Plan. Fetches from /api/valuation/vc, renders blended valuation hero with bear/base/bull scenarios.

tasks.title: CSV export of the full valuation model
tasks.rationale: exportCsv() on VC Valuation Dashboard hero — exports blended valuation, 4 methods, 36-month projections, unit economics, raise plan as a dated CSV. No new dependency required (client-side Blob).

tasks.title: /api/valuation/vc — VC-grade valuation API endpoint
tasks.rationale: GET: fetches user SVI + metrics from Supabase, infers sector, calls buildVcValuationReport. POST: scenario modelling. Live at /api/valuation/vc.

tasks.title: SCN context detection — auto-detect startup phase from input
tasks.rationale: src/lib/scn-detect.ts + /api/scn/detect live. Detects stage from idea/URL/GitHub/revenue. Integrated in main dashboard (ScnPositionHero, ScnDirectionNavigator).

tasks.title: Berkus method + AU comparables in valuation engine
tasks.rationale: berkusMethod() added to cfo-valuation.ts: 5 elements × A$775K max, scored from stage+MRR signals. Pre-revenue: Berkus active at 30% weight (rebalances to Berkus 30/Comp 25/VC 25/DCF 10/RFS 10). Revenue-positive: shown as informational reference (weight=0). 94/94 tests pass. Deploy 6 (sha e234613).

tasks.title: Weekly SEO roundup post — AU startup funding news
tasks.rationale: Fixed: publish-insight cron was writing articles to release dir only (not synced to source). Added post-hook to cron-runner.sh: after every publish-insight OK, copy new articles from release to source + auto-commit. Published 7 new articles (Jun 13). Total: 38 articles.

tasks.title: Onboarding wizard — 3-step welcome flow for new users
tasks.rationale: ALREADY LIVE: /onboarding + OnboardingWizard (654 lines, 3 steps: startup info → SVI analysis → boost). Wired in auth/verify/route.ts via onboarding_completed flag. KPI: ≥60% of new users complete first SVI analysis within 5min of signup.

tasks.title: SEO: /tools hub page with all 10 free tools
tasks.rationale: ALREADY LIVE: /tools/page.tsx with 10 tool cards, descriptions, CTAs. In sitemap at priority 0.8. KPI: /tools page ranks for 'free startup tools australia'.

tasks.title: SVI score history — trend chart per user
tasks.rationale: ALREADY LIVE: sviHistory fetched in dashboard/page.tsx from svi_accounts, passed to LivingSVIDashboard and AdvisorDashboard components. Trend rendered in SVIHistoryChart. KPI: returning users see score progression.

tasks.title: Article sync fix — cron-runner.sh post-hook for publish-insight
tasks.rationale: publish-insight was writing new articles to the release dir only (not the source dir). Fixed via post-hook in cron-runner.sh: after every successful publish-insight, copy new .md + manifest + queue from release dir back to content/insights/ and auto-commit. Prevents article loss on next deploy.

tasks.title: Evidence Vault Phase 2 — OAuth connectors (GitHub, Stripe, Google Analytics)
tasks.rationale: Evidence Vault UI exists in workspace/evidence. Phase 2 adds real data connectors: OAuth GitHub → pull commit activity + repo stats; Stripe → pull MRR/revenue; Google Analytics → pull traffic. Each connector auto-updates SVI score on connection. KPI: ≥1 connected data source per active user.

tasks.title: Founding 50 conversion push — in-app upgrade prompt after 2nd analysis
tasks.rationale: 28 users, 0 paid. After user's 2nd free analysis (1 credit used out of 2), show an upgrade prompt: 'You've used 1 of 2 free credits. Upgrade to Founding 50 for A$49 — 50 analyses, Evidence Vault, and cap table tools.' KPI: ≥5 paid conversions within 14 days of launch.
tasks.notes: UpgradePrompt banner added to workspace-layout.tsx — shown when balance===1 and plan===free. Calls /api/stripe/checkout with plan:founding50. Session-dismissible via sessionStorage.

tasks.title: Financial projection norms calculator
tasks.rationale: Implement financial projection norms calculator with growth, churn, gross margin, Rule of 40, NRR, CAC payback, LTV/CAC by stage to help Australian founders with financial planning

tasks.title: Market sizing methodology framework
tasks.rationale: Develop a market sizing methodology framework with top-down and bottom-up TAM/SAM/SOM approaches and credible AU/global sources to support founders in market analysis

tasks.title: AU startup marketing benchmarks 2026 report
tasks.rationale: Create a report on AU startup marketing benchmarks for 2026 to provide valuable insights for Australian founders in marketing strategy planning

tasks.title: AI Onboarding Welcome Flow
tasks.rationale: Stage-aware 3-step onboarding wizard for first-time users to drive activation.

tasks.title: AI Score Confidence + Action Plan Cards
tasks.rationale: Surface SVI score confidence and AI-generated action cards on dashboard.

tasks.title: SAFE Note Calculator (Free SEO tool)
tasks.rationale: Public calculator for AU founders comparing SAFE terms across investors.

tasks.title: Investor View Notification Email
tasks.rationale: Email founder when an investor opens a shared SVI link.

tasks.title: GitHub Activity Evidence Integration
tasks.rationale: OAuth GitHub connector pulls commits/contributors as svi_evidence (tech traction).

tasks.title: /tools hub page — SEO aggregator
tasks.rationale: Single landing page for 10 free founder tools to capture organic search traffic.

tasks.title: SVI score history trend chart
tasks.rationale: Show users their SVI trajectory over time on the main dashboard.

tasks.title: 5 SEO articles — AU funding, SAFE, equity split, Antler
tasks.rationale: Long-form content for high-intent search terms.

tasks.title: AU comparable companies data — 30+ startups
tasks.rationale: Expanded comparables in valuation engine for AU-specific multiples.

tasks.title: C-Level blended valuation engine + BlockID self-analysis
tasks.rationale: Blend C-Level inputs into single valuation; produce BlockID self-financial model.

tasks.title: Sync implementing-plan.md and project-state.json with shipped tasks
tasks.rationale: Drift-correct the plan/state files (stuck at T0017) to reflect T0018–T0084. Bump to v2.0.0. Register T0086–T0090.

tasks.title: Financial Projection Norms Calculator (/tools/financial-projections)
tasks.rationale: Free interactive calculator: founders input stage/sector/ARR/headcount, receive AU benchmark norms (burn, runway, growth, CAC, LTV) from benchmarks.ts.

tasks.title: Term Sheet AI v2 — persist analyses, Lawyer Questions, SVI link
tasks.rationale: Persist authenticated analyses to term_sheet_analyses Supabase table; add Save button; expose Lawyer Questions section; link to user SVI score.

tasks.title: Fundraising Readiness Report v2 — checklist + AU comparable raises
tasks.rationale: Augment SVI report PDF with Fundraising Checklist (from data_room_checklist) and Comparable Raises (from benchmarks.ts).

tasks.title: Google Analytics OAuth evidence connector
tasks.rationale: Add GA4 OAuth flow on /dashboard/integrations; fetch monthly sessions + bounce rate; store as svi_evidence dimension mkt. Env stubs GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET.

tasks.title: SVI Cohort Benchmark page (/dashboard/benchmark)
tasks.rationale: Show user SVI vs anonymised AU pre-seed/seed cohort percentile; bar chart distribution, highlight user position.

tasks.title: ESOP Pool Structure Design (12% pool, 4yr/1yr cliff, AU ESS compliant)
tasks.rationale: Design ESOP pool for BlockID.au investor readiness. Fixes major cap table governance gap (+8 SVI).

tasks.title: ESOP Legal Templates (Plan Deed, Offer Letter, Founder Vesting, Shareholders Agreement)
tasks.rationale: AU-specific legal docs ready for lawyer review. Required for Antler pitch June 30.

tasks.title: ESOP Technical Spec — Database schema, API endpoints, vesting engine
tasks.rationale: Complete technical specification for ESOP implementation in Supabase + Next.js.

tasks.title: ESOP Manager UI — Pool status, grant wizard, grants table, /dashboard/esop page
tasks.rationale: Full ESOP Manager UI: EsopPoolStatus, EsopGrantForm (3-step), EsopGrantsTable, /dashboard/esop, API routes /api/esop/pool + /api/esop/grants. Added to Fundraise nav.

tasks.title: BlockID.au SVI Self-Analysis — 68/100 score, investor path to 85+
tasks.rationale: Comprehensive 8-dimension SVI analysis of BlockID.au. Valuation: A$440K pre-money. Antler readiness: 65-75%.

tasks.title: 36-Month Financial Projections — A$250K→A$1M→A$3.6M ARR, 5-method valuation
tasks.rationale: Conservative 3-year P&L, unit economics (LTV:CAC 10:1), break-even Month 13, A$440K pre-money valuation.

tasks.title: Data Room Structure — 13-section framework, 47% complete, roadmap to 70% by Antler
tasks.rationale: Professional investor data room framework. 13 sections, priority checklists, security practices.

tasks.title: C-Level Knowledge Base Consolidation — 11 agents, 8 modules, 99KB
tasks.rationale: Master knowledge base injected into all C-Level agents: ESOP, valuation, SVI, data room expertise.

tasks.title: cfo-esop-scoring.ts — ESOP governance scoring engine + valuation integration
tasks.rationale: scoreEsop() function for CGH dimension: pool, grants, vesting, SHA, data room scoring with SVI contribution and valuation multiplier.

tasks.title: /api/knowledge-base — C-Level knowledge base search API
tasks.rationale: REST API to query .claude/knowledge-base/ modules. Powers runtime agent knowledge injection for ESOP, SVI, valuation expertise.

tasks.title: /api/esop/score — ESOP governance health score API
tasks.rationale: Fetches pool + grants, builds GovernanceHealth, returns CGH score with prioritized actions.

tasks.title: cfo-valuation.ts upgrade — ESOP governance inputs in risk factor model
tasks.rationale: Added hasEsopPool, esopGrantsIssued, hasFounderVesting etc. to VcValuationInput. riskFactorSummation() now +4% to -5% based on governance.

tasks.title: SVI Upgrade Roadmap widget — personalized 68→75 action plan
tasks.rationale: Dashboard component showing current SVI → target with checkable action items from /api/esop/score. Visual progress bar with projected score.

tasks.title: ESOP Legal Checklist tool (/tools/esop-checklist) — SEO page
tasks.rationale: 19-point ESOP setup checklist with priority/SVI impact. SEO: AU ESOP, ESS Part 7A, Antler requirements. Added to sitemap + tools page.

tasks.title: /api/dataroom/readiness — 13-section weighted data room scoring API
tasks.rationale: Weighted scoring across 13 data room sections, supplements uploads with SVI signals, tiers: not-started/early/investor-ready/due-diligence-ready.
